channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Eli Lilly Reduces Drug Discounts for Rural Hospitals. Is This Legal?
Biden-appointed judge criticizes Trump ICE crackdown as 'irrational,' overturns courthouse arrest policy
item.description: A federal judge invalidated Trump-era ICE policies on courthouse arrests and prolonged detention, citing a lack of logical justification.

item.title: Attorney John Morgan Launches 'Common Ground Party'
item.description: A prominent Florida attorney unveiled the name of a new political party on Wednesday. John Morgan, founder of Morgan & Morgan la...

item.title: Winners and losers emerge after socialist wave hits NYC primaries
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani's socialist coalition won NYC Democratic primaries, ousting incumbents like Reps. Espaillat and Goldman in a major shakeup.
